zh.lifeSummary: 當Viridis di Visconti於1352年出生在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾時，她的父親Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy29歲，母親Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan21歲。她於1365年2月23日與Leopold III., der Gerechte, Herzog von Österreich und Innerösterreich在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1414年3月1日在奧地利亞特可拉根福特 藍德希迪其享年62歲，埋葬在南斯拉夫斯洛維尼亞流布利陽納流布利陽納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Viridis di Visconti于1352年出生在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾时，她的父亲Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy29岁，母亲Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan21岁。她于1365年2月23日与Leopold III., der Gerechte, Herzog von Österreich und Innerösterreich在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1414年3月1日在奥地利亞特可拉根福特 藍德希迪其享年62岁，埋葬在南斯拉夫斯洛文尼亚流布利陽納流布利陽納。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Visconti
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Pasquale, Rocco, Umberto, Amerigo, Angelo, Carlo, Domenic, Ennio, Gaetano, Gerlando, Gino.  French Laurent, Camille, Girard.

Italian: from visconte, a title of rank (medieval Latin vicecomes ‘deputy of a count’). Unusually (since most noble families took their surnames from their estates), the surname was sometimes of literal application, but without doubt it is also in part a nickname for someone who gave himself airs and graces, and in part a metonymic occupational name for someone in the employ of a viscount. This surname is also found in southern France.

variants.name: Viscomi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Emilio, Salvatore, Antonio, Beniamino, Filomena, Mario, Rodolfo, Santo.
Italian: Sicilian and Calabrian form of Visconti , from medieval Latin viscomes ‘deputy’, Greek biskōmēs.

en.lifeSummary: When Viridis di Visconti was born in 1352, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy, her father, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, was 29 and her mother, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, was 21. She married Leopold III., der Gerechte, Herzog von Österreich und Innerösterreich on 23 February 1365, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 1 March 1414, in Sittich, Klagenfurt Land, Carinthia, Austria, at the age of 62, and was buried in Ljubljana, Ljubljana, Slovenia, Yugoslavia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Viridis di Visconti est née en 1352, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie, son père, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Leopold III., der Gerechte, Herzog von Österreich und Innerösterreich le 23 février 1365, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 mars 1414, à Sittich, Klagenfurt Land, Kärnten, Autriche, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Ljubljana, Ljubljana, Slovénie, Yougoslavie.

de.Bruck an der Mur, Steiermark, Österreich: Bruck an der Mur, Steiermark, Österreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Viridis di Visconti 1352 in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy 29 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan 21. Sie hat am 23. Februar 1365 in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien Leopold III., der Gerechte, Herzog von Österreich und Innerösterreich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. März 1414 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Sittich, Klagenfurt Land, Kärnten, Österreich und wurde in Ljubljana, Ljubljana, Slowenien, Jugoslawien begraben.

Lei sposato Leopold III., der Gerechte, Herzog von Österreich und Innerösterreich il 23 febbraio 1365, nel Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Viridis di Viscontiが1352年にイタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノで生まれた時，父Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardyは29歳，母Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milanは21歳であった。1365年2月23日にイタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノでLeopold III., der Gerechte, Herzog von Österreich und Innerösterreichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1414年3月1日にオーストリアクaルンテンクラジェンファート ランドシッティチで62歳で死去し，セルビア モンテネグロスロヴェニアルジュブルジャナルジュブルジャナにて埋葬された。

ko.Bruck an der Mur, Steiermark, Österreich: 오스트리아 스테이마크 브럭 앤 데르 머
ko.lifeSummary: Viridis di Visconti(이)가 1352년 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1365년 2월 23일 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 Leopold III., der Gerechte, Herzog von Österreich und Innerösterreich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1414년 3월 1일 오스트리아 ka른텐 클라겐퍼트 랜드 짓티치에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 유고 슬라비아 슬로베니아 j블재나 j블재나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Viridis di Visconti nasceu em 1352, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália, seu pai, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Leopold III., der Gerechte, Herzog von Österreich und Innerösterreich em 23 de fevereiro de 1365, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1 de março de 1414, em Sittich, Klagenfurt Land, Kärnten, Áustria, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Ljubljana, Ljubljana, Eslovênia, Iugoslávia.

ru.Bruck an der Mur, Steiermark, Österreich: брукк ан дир мур, стиирмарк, Австрия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Viridis di Visconti родилась в 1352 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия, её отцу по имени Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Leopold III., der Gerechte, Herzog von Österreich und Innerösterreich 23 февраля 1365 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 марта 1414 г. в местности ситтич, кладженфурт ланд, кaрнтен, Австрия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности лджублджана, лджублджана, Словения, Югославия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Viridis di Visconti nació en 1352, en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, su papá, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Leopold III., der Gerechte, Herzog von Österreich und Innerösterreich el 23 de febrero de 1365, en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de marzo de 1414, en Sittich, Klagenfurt Land, Kärnten, Austria, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Ljubljana, Ljubljana, Eslovenia, Yugoslavia.
